title: The Very Hungry Caterpillar
author: Eric Carle
description: A classic picture book about a caterpillar's journey to becoming a butterfly
rucha_review: A must-have for every young reader. Perfect for building reading confidence.

title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid
author: Jeff Kinney
description: Greg Heffley's hilarious middle school adventures told through text and cartoons
rucha_review: Great for reluctant readers. The comic-style illustrations keep kids engaged.

title: The Blue Umbrella
author: Ruskin Bond
description: A young girl in the Himalayas trades her lucky leopard claw for a beautiful blue umbrella
rucha_review: Ruskin Bond at his finest. Perfect for building love of Indian literature.
